title: ranunculus aquatilis var. sphaerospermus
intro: Ranunculus aquatilis var. sphaerospermus, also known as the round-fruited water crowfoot, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ranunculus aquatilis var. sphaerospermus include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although it is essential to use caution and consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
